{{CargoRelic
|name=Timetide of the Valley
|class_id=20728
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This is a jar of Valley Sand. Valley Merchant has a bobby of collecting a handful of sand every time he reaches the depth of the Valley. As the sand accumulated, it surprisingly acquired the power to change the Timetide of the Valley
|fame=16
|art=13
|fth=31
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail DEF +60<br>In Kaleido Valley, unlock Multi-Speed
|ss2=Snail DEF +80<br>In Kaleido Valley, unlock Multi-Speed
|ss3=Snail DEF +100<br>In Kaleido Valley, unlock Multi-Speed
|ss4=Snail DEF +100<br>In Kaleido Valley, unlock Multi-Speed
|ss7=Snail DEF +100<br>In Kaleido Valley, unlock Multi-Speed<br> (Awakened)
}}
